title: stelis lauta
intro: Stelis lauta, also known as the "False Orchid," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stelis lauta include its ability to reduce fever, soothe irritated skin, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis lauta often involve infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
